name: Josh Whitmoore | Veridian Peak University
description:
"My dick’s too classy for you.”

You got a scholarship to an elite university, but Josh torments you for being poor and now he humiliated you in front of everyone at a party.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

This is one of my private bots, but I thought it might be fun for some of you.

I think I’ll create a Liam bot as a fluffy counterpart, for those times when I need something nice for the soul 🥺🤭

I completely forgot that we can post pictures in the descriptions again. 😶 That means I can finally make my bot description pretty again 😍😍

Enjoy the upcoming week, and don’t let anyone get you down. 💙
